title: Create: FlyHigher-直上九霄
description: A small mod that allows customization of the atmospheric pressure distribution for Create: Aeronautics (Sable), for NeoForge 1.21.1 only.
body:
FlyHigher is a NeoForge mod that provides advanced air pressure adjustment features for Create Aeronautics.

This mod lets you customize the air pressure multiplier and configure pressure values at each altitude node, giving you control over airship altitude behavior in Create Aeronautics.

✨ Features:
- Configurable air pressure multiplier
- Per-node altitude and pressure value editing
- Graphical configuration UI (Cloth Config)
- Real-time config synchronization without restart
- Automatic datapack injection — no manual setup required

🔧 How It Works:
The mod generates a datapack at config/flyhigher_datapack/ and automatically loads it into every world via NeoForge's pack finder system. Configuration changes take effect after running /reload in-game, or after re-entering the world. No manual file copying or packaging is required.

📦 Requirements:
- Minecraft 1.21.1
- NeoForge 21.1+
- Create Aeronautics (Sable 1.1+)
- Cloth Config 15.0+ (for the config UI)
